column1: # Wikipedia Action API (search + extract) -- indicator catalog
# This file is the single source of truth for which Wikipedia Action API
# actions the Stage 2 adapter invokes. Adding/removing an action here is the
# only change needed to widen or narrow the ingestion.
# Source: Wikipedia Action API at https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php
# License: CC BY-SA 4.0 (article text); API responses per wiki terms of use.
# Cite per docs/source-attributions.md.
# Important design notes:
# - Wikipedia is a NARRATIVE-CONTEXT helper
#   here is a thin wrapper that takes an explicit list of queries/titles
#   (queries=...) and persists the verbatim API response as the audit trail.
#   The adapter does NOT browse
#   decisions are downstream (Stage 4 leader resolution
#   narrative).
# - raw_column is the API action name ("extracts" or "search").
# - raw_scale is "text" because each API call returns the article extract
#   (plain text) or the search hit list.
# - normalized_value is NULL (the extract is a string
# - higher_is_better=1 by convention but has no scoring impact.
# - unit is "text" -- the cell value is the verbatim API response (text).
# - country_id and leader_id are NULL at Stage 2; Stage 4 resolves the
#   pageid/title to a country or leader when applicable.
# Per-task input contract:
#   The orchestrator takes an explicit `queries` list (the input interface is
#   deterministic; the adapter does NOT browse Wikipedia to discover leaders).
#   Each query hits the action listed in raw_column:
#     - raw_column="extracts"  -> action=query&prop=extracts&exintro=1&explaintext=1&titles=<query>
#     - raw_column="search"    -> action=query&list=search&srsearch=<query>
#   The verbatim API response is cached at
#   data/raw/wikipedia_search_extract/cache/<cache_key>.json so re-runs skip
#   HTTP.
# When extending this file:
#   1. Pick an action the Action API exposes (prop=extracts
#      and verify the URL template.
#   2. Pick a variable_name of the form wikipedia_<action>_<purpose> that does
#      not collide with existing entries.
#   3. Set unit="text"
#   4. Update the orchestrator's URL builder for the new action if needed.
variable_name
wikipedia_extract_lead
column10: explaintext=1) - article lead/intro paragraph for a given title

column1: wikipedia_search_results
column8: Wikipedia Action API search (list=search) - search hit list for a given srsearch query
